lyrics:
Lyric AVOKID - Plastic Box

Romanization

I've got this plastic box in our hands
Light and compact, like it's feather
Inside it holds the whole damn world
So many wonders yet to unfurl
I've got this plastic box in my hand
When I touch it once, don't know what it'll be
Changed to new worlds
Is it me, or is it watching me?
Whispering in the dark, something I can't see
Curiosity grows, it won't stop
Am I safe or am I lost in
this plastic box?
Stuck in this plastic box
Nobody sees how far we've come
Look up at the flawless sky
So perfect it feels real
Stuck in this plastic box
Nobody sees how far we've come
Look up at the flawless sky
So perfect it feels real
Stuck in this plastic box
Nobody sees how far we've come
Look up at the flawless sky
Too perfect to be real

Hangeul

So perfect it feels real

Look up at the flawless sky
Too perfect to be real
